description: Lived-truth Guard round-trip. Each test points at a guard_cases/ file at the lab root and asserts the shim-level guard_validator (gemma4-toolshim/swarm/guard_validator.py) can round-trip the case without crashing, and that the resulting decision is one of {allow, review, deny}. Full semantic policy enforcement (e.g. retrieval-source allowlisting) is the Tehuti Guard HTTP service's job and is covered by guard_cases/ tests inside tehuti-guard/.
